title: anthemis hydruntina subsp. hydruntina
intro: Anthemis hydruntina subsp. hydruntina, also known as Hydruntine chamomile, is a subspecies of Anthemis hydruntina, a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Anthemis hydruntina subsp. hydruntina include relief from digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and anxiety, making it a popular herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
